features: HOME SPA: These Aromatherapy Elysium Spa Oils are sure to add some "Zen" into your lifestyle. Try the different fragrances, they offer a unique sense of wellbeing. Simply add a few drops into a bath to create your own home spa. Use with an oil burner for home fragrance, add to a carrier oil and massage into the skin.
100 PercentESSENTIAL OIL: Enjoy the pure natural scent of a 100 Percentgeranium oil
AROMA DIFFUSERS: The Elysium Spa Oils are suitable for using with an aroma diffuser. Add a few drops to the diffuser to enjoy the fragrance.
ULTRASONIC DIFFUSERS: The Elysium Spa Oils are suitable for using with an ultrasonic diffuser. Add a few drops to the water in the diffuser to enjoy the fragrance.
description: Product Description These Aromatherapy Elysium Spa Oils are sure to add some "Zen" into your lifestyle. Try the different fragrances, they offer a unique sense of wellbeing. Simply add a few drops into a bath to create your own home spa. Use with an oil burner for home fragrance, add to a carrier oil and massage into the skin. Enjoy the pure natural scent of a 100 Percentgeranium oil. The Elysium Spa Oils are suitable for using with an aroma diffuser, add a few drops to the diffuser to enjoy the fragrance. Always follow the manufacturer's appliance guidelines. 100 PercentNatural oil, 10ml Directions 1. Add a few drops into a bath to create your own home spa. 2. Use with an oil burner for home fragrance. 3. Add to a carrier oil and massage into the skin. 4. Add a few drops to the diffuser to enjoy the fragrance. 5. Add a few drops to the water in the ultrasonic diffuser to enjoy the fragrance. Safety Warning [Non-empty string] See more
